56The Abundance Mindset"
This is what most people (in all aspects of life) get wrong. And it is especia\ the
case in the dating world. The absolute bullshit guys will put up with from a woman is
mind boggling. They get attached and "oneitis" the first time they date a girl. And they
make dumb decisions based on emotion and fear of losing a girl who is not really "theirs"
in the first place. This translates to bad news online -- as it turns women off (I kinda feel
sorry for women these days üth all the needy guys out there). Anywa)¡, there are literall),
MILLIOIT{S of single women out there. If one clowns, flakes or in any way acts low class
then move on without hesitation or regret. It's the same in business, too. You don't have to
put up with abusive and goofy customers who think, just because they paid you, they can
treat you like a trained monkey. (This is especially true in the freelancing world.) Hey, you
know that woman you thought was classy and you started to like who flaked on you? You

the good ones. So arryway, the first step in the Email Players way of online dating (and

If you live in a big city it's even more abundant. Knowing this and owning it as a way of

The Ernail Players O.line Dating Secret #3¡
66Get Cerebral And Play Chess With Her Via Ernail"
Oooooooh yeah! Now we're getting to the fun part. And, for most dudes I know,
the tricky part. Guys tend to be very impatient with chicks. They don't realize she's
chatting with 4 other guys while emailing him back and on the phone making a date with
a 5th guy atl simultaneously. (Not unlike your customers for your business -- you think
you're the ONLY choice they're thinking of buying from?) Sucks, eh? Well, for ordinary
guys it does. For an Email Player like you, it's not so bad at all. In fact, it's a lot of fun. But
first, a little side trip down memory lane. fu I mentioned earlier, I've been doing online
dating before the term even existed (or, if it did exist, it was in hushed whispers behind
closed doors in guys' moms'basements while sharing a bag of cheetos). I literally "sold"
my ex-wife on leaving her life behind and marrying me after seeing me only two times...
mostly with email (and lots of phone calls, too). So, I have some unique perspectives on
this, I think. Ary*^y, the first thing is to, yes, READ a woman's profile before you even
think of emailing her. Very few dudes do this. Theyjust look at the pictures then mail
some lame email "hi" or "your profile is interesting" or "What's up, you're pretty" or
other inanely boring emails. Then, they wonder why she doesn't email him back (and the
rea\ creepy dudes then get angry and start complaining to her with more emails, which
she continues to ignore... remember this if you remember nothing else: Alwa)¡s keep )rour
dtgpiry, before sending anything always ask "is this going to make me lose my dignity?" If
the answer is yes, don't send it... good adüce for your business emails too, yeah?) Where
was I? Oh, yes, what to say... The most important thing to remember about emails is, you
cannot bore a woman into being interested in you. If she's even half way attractive, she's
getting hit on by lots and lots of guys. Every day. Day in, and day out. She HAS to run
through her emails as fast as possible -- and that means ignoring or deleting emails on
sight with boring subject lines or content. That doesn't mean you have to write her a
novel. But the essence of email is to write like you talk. ffhat's why swiping emails is so
incredibly stupid -- you can't "swipe" a personality and not look like an idiot). So what
would you say if she was standing in front of you? Well, what I do is refer to something in
her profile. This is assuming she wrote anything of substance in her profile, of course.
And, sadly, many women don't -- th.y have gotten by on their good looks for so long, they
don't know how to express their personality (or, they try to overdo it and sound like
complete idiots sayrng how awesome they are, etc, it's actually kind of amusing to read).
Nothing you can do about it. In those cases I just ignore them. If she can't be bothered to
write something about herself other than "I don't know what to write on these things,

message me i)" she's not worthy of my time, attention or aflection right out the gate. If I

she is an INFJ (on the Meyers Briggs chart) and goes to church and believes in speaking in
tongues, you could say:
Subject line: Oh, you're one of THOSE...
..INFJ's That meyers briggs test is eerily accurate. Although
never met a Type A INFJ before (but then, INFJ's are kinda rare,
right? ) . I once witnessed someone speaking in tongues as a child.
No way did she fake that... Hope ya had a great weekend. - NAME
That is a real email I sent (and got a response to).Just have a conversation -- no
canned one-liners or emails. Don't think about getting into her pants, just... chat. Get
cerebral and play some chess (figuratively speaking). Also, if she doesn't email you back
right away, don't panic. It's like any other kind of marketing: Most people are not going
to buy from you. Don't take it personally. Muyb. she is just on the site looking for
attention... or she's pining for someone else and is just killing time... or she has so many
dudes emailing her yours got lost in the shuffle. Some guys will recommend sending
another email a couple weeks later to follow up. Me? I rarely do that, but I do think it's a
good idea. I got with my ex girlfriend that way -- we were bantering, then she stopped
suddenly for a few weeks. One night I got bored and, for fun, I sent an email and she got
back to me right away -- apparently she had been wondering what happened to me (even
though she was the one who stopped mailing. (Hey, girls be weird...)You also never want
to come off as needy or clingy. Guys have a tendency to do this due to a lack of
abundance mentality and nothing will shrivel up a woman's desire for you than being
needy. So don't do it. Your dig"ity comes first...
Finally,like in business, you want to sell burgers to a starving crowd. Online this

whateverlou do, do not buy dinner or go to the moües or any of that lame stuff. Instead,

*cxit strategy" if she doesn't look like her pictures (you'd be surprised how often this

have to reverse course immediately. She MUST be more interested in you than you are in
her (and if that's not the case, then you need to carry yourself as if you like her less -- a
good notch or two less is perfect, to establish yourself as a valuable man). My favorite
áctic to turn the tables and get a woman to like me more than I like her (it happens)is
to... friend zone her ass. I kid you not. It's like the $30 million dollar wine dude I wrote
about last year does ([on Rimmerman -- who does $30 million per year selling wine
ONLY by email -- I wrote about him in theJune 2013 "Email Players" issue, see the
enclosed catalog for back issues): IIe creates interest through disinterest. This is a
powerful business strategy, too. When you "need" a customer, or someone's money or, yes,
á dut rmore than they need you or your solution, then you've lost. Your need comes off
as needy, and then you will "need" to find a new line of work. So anlrway, back to the
friend zonei I did this to one of my ex-girlfriends who I dated for 9 months (only reason it
ended is she had to move for herjob, and I had no desire to go where she went). We'd
been emailing back and forth for over a month. Reason why is, she lived 3 hours away
and she wasn't interested in that. So, I friend zoned her. I flat out told her we will just be
friends, and I only liked her that way aq.way (which was true, I never let myself "like" a
girl romantically until I've met and vetted her in person). The result was, she started
wanting me because she couldn't have me. (This exact same phenomenon works in selling
your products and services, too). And eventually she asked me if I wanted to speak by
phone (remember, I was mostly disinterested). What happened then was, we spoke for a
good 2 hours. Then 6 hours the next night (turns out we had way too much in common,
including where we grew up, etc). And even then, I kept my disinterested frame. Why?
Because, again, you don't really know someone until you meet them in person. So I
offered to drive out towards her and meet her at a park I reserve in her area for just such
occasions (nothing is done on accident on Planet Ben...) But, her desire for me was
building from üat disinterest and she ended up driüng out to my town (3 hours away)
one night on a whim, at I am. Who had the upper hand? That's right, this dude did.
And, that's how I stmcture ,Il -y "deals" -- whether it be in business or personal. You
gotta be the leader in all that you do. Like comedian Dante Nero says, "if you let a
woman steer your ship you're going to end up on the rocks". You can't let other people or

The Ernail Players Online Dating Secret #5:
66IIow To Close lhe Dealt,
Finally, after you've got her interest, you emailed her and/or got her on the phone,
it's time to close the deal. To get the meeting. To get her to put you over and above all the
other guys competing for her attention (and if she's attractive, don't kid yourself, she's
entertaining the idea of dating lots of guys, competition online is fierce). So what do you
do to have "hand" and prevent the typical pretty American girl's inane desire to flake and

right (folowed the above to the letter) she should be B0% "sold" already. This is
something I heard Dan Kennedy say. He doesn't even get on the phoné unless someone is
B0% sold already. So it's not like you have to do a bunch of conüncing or whatever. She's
just waiting for you to ask for the sale. Customers are the same way in business. If you do
your marketing right, you are far more like an "order taker" than a "sales man." And if
she still hems and haws? Still stays on the fence? Still puts you off, yet keeps you on a
string (you can never fully prevent this from happening to you)? You havetwo options:
l. You can cut her out of your life.
Yep, radio silence is golden. Nothing will drive a woman wild with curiosity
(especia\ one who is hot and used to guys kissing her ass) like rejecting her. Not ,lfriend
zoning" her -- but outright rejecting her. By stopping all contact out of the blue, dating
other people, and letting her know (without saying a single word) that you're in demand,
that you don't need her, and that you won't tolerate bdñhit. This is thá option I usually
do. Mostly, because I just don't have the patience for high maintenan.. .iri.kr. Ten yeá.s
ago I might keep at itjust for the fun. But these days women are like #4 on my list of
priorities and my goals trump all. If any woman gets in the way of that, out they go.
What's the second option then?
2. You persist until youtre #1 on her list
